description: Lashkar-e-Taiba co-founder Amir Hamza was shot by unknown gunmen in Lahore, marking a second assassination attempt in less than a year. The 67-year-old, a designated global terrorist, was attacked outside a TV station while accompanied by a Pakistani judge. This incident follows a previous attempt where he survived a shooting last May.

Parents in Portugal, 5-year-old tied to iron gate by cop grandmother; police dept acts
description: An assistant sub-inspector in Faridkot was suspended after allegedly tying her five-year-old granddaughter to a gate. Neighbors intervened after hearing the child wailing and found her hands and feet bound. The ASI, who was caring for the child while her parents were abroad, was suspended after a video of the incident went viral.

'Serial bride & fake dad' flee with grooms' cash, gold near Mumbai
description: Kashimira police apprehended a man and woman for a wedding scam, where the bride would abscond with valuables days after the ceremony.  The duo, targeting divorced men over 40, were involved in five Maharashtra cases.  The man posed as family to arrange marriages, with the woman then fleeing with cash and jewellery.  They have been remanded in custody.

Exclusive: Jubin Nautiyal ties the knot with childhood sweetheart
description: Singer Jubin Nautiyal has married his childhood sweetheart. The wedding was a private affair with only close family present. Nautiyal chose a simple, traditional ceremony over a large public celebration. He has always kept his personal life private. Nautiyal had previously shared a glimpse of his partner on Valentine's Day. The singer has not commented on the news.
